author: David Gao
name: RDQuant: Per-Layer Rate-Distortion Quantization with Dead-Zone
blurb: Per-layer R-D optimized mixed quantization (int4/int5/int6 with dead-zone) on top of MLP3x+SmearGate+BigramHash+SWA recipe. Dead-zone quantization creates more zeros for better zstd compression at negligible BPB cost.
